title: Just Bookcases
description: An extremely opinionated language pack that renames the Chiseled Bookshelf to Bookcase, and gives the old Bookshelves a new name entirely.
body:
This is a very nitpicky language pack that fixes my pet peeves with the name of Chiselled Bookshelves >:)
1. Why does it sound like just a bookshelf variant when it's the actual functional block? Surely it should take the forefront over the old bookshelf, now we have a working one?
2. It should be a bookcase instead of a shelf, as it's a free-standing piece of furniture!

To solve this extremely critical, game-breaking issue, this pack renames the Chiselled Bookshelf to **Bookcase**, and the old Bookshelf to **Book-Patterned Planks**, in order to reflect its decorative nature. It supports all the in-game English dialects `en_us`, `en_au`, `en_ca`, `en_gb` `en_nz` as well as the fun ones!
* `en_ud` (Upside Down) - Self-explanatory
* `en_pt` (Pirate) - Bookcase becomes **Stack o' knowledge**, Book-Patterned Planks becomes **Planks o' no knowledge**
* `enp` (Anglish) - Bookcase becomes **Book Cupboard**, Book-Patterned Planks becomes **Book-Mustered Boards**
* `enws` (Shakespearean) - Bookcase stays the same, Book-Patterned Planks becomes **Book-Patterned Timber**

_French, German and Spansish translations may come at some point in the future. If you want to contribute a new language, you can submit a pull request on the GitHub (greatly appreciated!!)_

This pack synergises well with [All Bookshelves in Lecterns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/all-bookshelves-in-lecterns) and [Chiseled Bookshelves Add Enchantment Power]([https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-chiseled-bookshelves-add-enchantment-power/gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-chiseled-bookshelves-add-enchantment-power/gallery))!

Thanks for reading this far, hope you enjoyed! :)
![A minecraft player crouches and looks up at the camera. She's holding a written book, and standing next to a bookcase and a decorated heart-pattern pot with a mushroom inside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afe76783b96583c1eff828fee167da0a9f70f400.png)
